response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack and systems experience across many languages and domains, but lacks the core requirements for this role: no demonstrated recent C++ development on Windows (only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain background. The bulk of recent work is Node.js/TypeScript/DLang in unrelated industries (direct mail, ad-tech, GIS, investment platform in Germany but not capital markets/fixed income).
strengths: Solid software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Strong polyglot foundation including some C/C++ exposure and systems-level work at National Instruments
Excellent communication evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching experience
concerns: No substantial recent C++ experience; only ~6 months of C/C++ work in 2014-2015, far short of the 5-10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience listed; only MongoDB and MySQL
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience (RIDE Capital was retail investment, not capital markets)

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain
